reviewer_notes: White moved the queen onto d1 while it remained exposed to the rook on d8. The lesson must identify loose or tactically vulnerable material and recommend checking attacks and defenders.
White spent three early tempi moving the queen instead of developing pieces. The lesson must connect repeated queen moves to lost development time and king safety.
